message:
Test enrichment batch 5: ~8,000 lines across 21 source modules

PearlTower 2026-03-02 enrichment wave adding comprehensive test
coverage across engine subsystems:

- baseline_interpreter.rs (+788): GetProperty/SetProperty instruction
  tests, heap object allocation, capability-gated module execution,
  register-based value propagation
- e2e_harness.rs (+796): ScenarioClass coverage, replay performance
  edge cases (zero wall time), replay input validation, model pointer
  validation, DeterministicRunner fixture paths
- cut_line_automation.rs (+552): cut-line gate edge cases, boundary
  conditions, multi-gate coordination sequences
- specialization_conformance.rs (+468): conformance matrix validation,
  specialization compatibility checks, version constraint resolution
- js_runtime_lane.rs (+465): runtime lane routing, execution context
  propagation, lane isolation guarantees
- fork_detection.rs (+431): fork detection state machine transitions,
  divergence classification, recovery path validation
- trust_economics.rs (+384): trust scoring models, economic incentive
  alignment, reputation decay curves
- migration_compatibility.rs (+375): migration path validation,
  compatibility matrix generation, version bridging
- parallel_parser.rs (+366): parallel parse session lifecycle, chunk
  merging, deterministic ordering guarantees
- fleet_convergence.rs (+356): fleet-wide convergence detection,
  quorum thresholds, split-brain recovery
- obstruction_certificate.rs (+349): certificate issuance, revocation
  chains, validity window enforcement
- policy_theorem_compiler.rs (+303): policy theorem compilation,
  satisfiability checking, counterexample generation
- tropical_semiring.rs (+298): semiring operations, path algebra,
  fixpoint computation convergence
- causal_replay.rs (+292): causal ordering verification, replay
  determinism, event graph reconstruction
- rgc_test_harness.rs (+290): harness manifest extensions, env
  fingerprint stability, artifact validation enrichment
- budgeted_optimization.rs (+280): budget allocation, optimization
  pass ordering, resource exhaustion handling
- storage_adapter.rs (+241): adapter lifecycle, durability guarantees,
  crash recovery sequences
- governance_hooks.rs (+294): hook registration, policy enforcement,
  audit trail completeness
- hybrid_lane_router.rs (+175): lane selection heuristics, fallback
  routing, performance tier classification
- runtime_comparison_gate.rs (+145): comparison gate threshold
  validation, regression detection sensitivity
- anti_entropy.rs (+107): entropy repair cycles, consistency
  convergence, conflict resolution strategies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
